required_preferences.fact: Plans unplugged family-centric weekends that include her fiancé’s parents, turning off work notifications and focusing on shared meals and collaborative wedding tasks instead of private outdoor activities

supersedes.fact: Plans one unplugged Sunday per month with her fiancé, turning off all work notifications and focusing on outdoor activities

required_preferences.fact: Resumes silencing work notifications at 8 PM to protect evening study time for her renewed CPA preparation, except during critical client audit weeks.

supersedes.fact: Checks work email into the evening during the internal investigation period — CPA study sessions paused, no longer silences notifications at 8 PM

required_preferences.fact: Takes a 10-minute walk after lunch every workday to clear her head — never eats lunch at her desk
Avoids caffeine entirely throughout the day, replaces afternoon coffee breaks with herbal tea or water to comply with medical advice
Prepares easily freezable and reheatable meals for her mother's household during her stay — adapts meal prep habits to support her mother's dietary needs
Sets aside Friday lunch hours for informal team gatherings to build rapport and foster collaboration among junior staff.

persona: A 28-year-old junior auditor working at a multinational corporation
